_meta.purpose: COBRA and ACA-marketplace constants for the layoff cluster's cobra-vs-marketplace calculator. Federal COBRA structural constants are stable statutory/DOL figures. The 2026 FPL table, 400% cliff thresholds, and ACA applicable-percentage table are NOT duplicated here — they already live in src/data/federal.ts (acaSubsidy) and are imported by the engine (spec item 4). This file adds only what the shared engine does not already hold: COBRA mechanics, per-state mini-COBRA flags, and KFF market averages.
_meta.sourcing_status: Federal COBRA constants sourced to DOL and shippable. KFF premium averages carry the spec's 2025 baseline and MUST be refreshed to 2026 KFF before ship. Per-state mini_cobra flags are UNSOURCED stubs pending state insurance-law lookup. See data_notes.md.

cobra_federal.estimation_method: W-2 Box 12 Code DD (total annual premium) / 12 x 1.02 = monthly COBRA premium
cobra_federal.retroactive_note: Coverage is retroactive to the loss date if elected within the 60-day window, which enables a wait-and-see strategy. One late payment terminates coverage.

aca_2026.note: Enhanced premium tax credits expired 2025-12-31 (OBBBA did not extend). The 400% FPL subsidy cliff and reverted contribution percentages are back for 2026. FPL table, cliffThresholds400pct, and applicablePercentages2026 are read from src/data/federal.ts acaSubsidy — not duplicated here.
aca_2026.state_backfill_programs_note: NM, CT, and WA run state subsidy backfill programs as of Q1 2026; a few others were under discussion. Not modeled in v1 — surfaced as a per-state note.
aca_2026.volatility_notice: Congress was negotiating a subsidy extension as of Q1 2026. If passed, this file and the ACA scenario page need same-week updates.

kff_premium_averages._status: BASELINE FROM SPEC (KFF 2025 Employer Health Benefits Survey) — MUST be refreshed to exact 2026 KFF figures during Phase 1 sourcing before ship.

mini_cobra_by_state._status: UNSOURCED STUBS. Per-state mini-COBRA (state continuation) applies to employers under 20 employees and varies by state (duration, eligibility). Each flag must be sourced to the state's insurance-department page before ship. Populated null pending Phase 1 sourcing — see data_notes.md.
